summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No merge is recommended because no item has a complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof. One narrow contributor-branch repair path is concrete for #84438; broad or author-waiting PRs need maintainer/author resolution.

actions.reason: Broad code delta, explicit waiting-on-author status, and failing checks require maintainer/author follow-up before merge or repair planning.
The failed behavior-proof gate and waiting-on-author label leave an unresolved author/maintainer decision before this can be merged or repaired by Clownfish.
This is an independent small docs/install PR that should proceed through normal maintainer merge preflight; it is not a duplicate or repair target in this shard.
The change is broad, the branch is not maintainer-editable, and the PR is waiting on author; this needs maintainer judgment before replacement, split, or merge review.
The PR is small and maintainer-editable, but its behavior-proof failure blocks merge. Repair the contributor branch and rerun focused CLI validation before any merge recommendation.
Build one narrow repair artifact for #84438 rather than a broad multi-PR replacement.

needs_human: #78639: broad L-sized gateway/plugin/WhatsApp change, waiting on author, failing check/check-lint/check-test-types, and no merge preflight.
#80181: Real behavior proof failed and PR is waiting on author for a compatibility/auth-provider-risk change.
#81279: XL i18n/UI change, maintainer_can_modify=false, waiting on author, and touches many locale/generated metadata files beyond the zh-CN title scope.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #84438 by validating and, if needed, correcting the CLI argv flag-terminator behavior proof without expanding the scope beyond argv parsing and tests.
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair and finalize contributor PR #84438 from @humanbeingz-7. Keep the scope limited to CLI argv command-path parsing around FLAG_TERMINATOR and the focused regression tests for #83902. Before any merge recommendation, rerun the focused vitest files, pnpm check:changed, git diff --check, and Codex /review; carry contributor credit forward in the merge notes.
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/argv.test.ts src/cli/argv-invocation.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
credit_notes: Repair source PR #84438 from @humanbeingz-7 and preserve attribution in any maintainer notes or final merge commit.
